summary: Frontend-only retest of Moataz Arabic RTL admin platform after critical build-error fix. All admin E2E flows now functional. Login → /admin redirect works. Dashboard renders sidebar (right-side, RTL), 7 stat cards, recent posts list, quick-action cards. Posts list shows 4 rows (3 seeded + 1 leftover TEST_فكرة_597ad8 from prior backend test). Post editor (contentEditable) accepts title/excerpt/body and persists as draft (redirected to /admin/posts/[id]). Categories/Tags/Ideas CRUD create flows OK. Settings update returns '✓ تم الحفظ'. Media page shows uploaded file with copy-link/delete actions. Public newsletter POST shows success state. Search page renders without build-error overlay (the previous critical bug is resolved).

integration_issues.issue: Visiting /search?q=الذكاء renders the page (no overlay) but the SearchClient does not pre-fill the search input from the q URL parameter nor auto-run the query — user must re-type and click 'ابحث'. Form-submit search itself works. Minor UX gap; not blocking.

issues: Sidebar correctly placed on the right side. Layout, padding, contrast (cream bg + dark sidebar + gold accents) all clean. No issues.
Leftover row 'TEST_فكرة_597ad8' from previous backend test run is visible — recommend the main agent run a one-time cleanup of TEST_-prefixed Posts/Ideas/Categories/Tags before going to production.

action_items: (Minor) Make /search?q=... auto-populate the search input and trigger an initial search — currently the URL param is ignored on first paint.
(Hygiene) Clean leftover TEST_-prefixed seed records (e.g., post 'TEST_فكرة_597ad8', any TEST_ idea/category/tag) created by automated tests before production handoff.
critical_code_review_comments: Build-error blocker is resolved: `yarn build` succeeds and /admin/login renders cleanly. The split into SearchClient (client) + search/page.tsx (server) and the introduction of lib/settings.ts (direct prisma) for SiteHeader/SiteFooter are correct architectural fixes per Next.js 14 Server/Client component rules.
Admin sidebar margin fix (ms-72) renders correctly in RTL (sidebar is on the right, content on the left with proper offset).
useSearchParams() now properly wrapped in <Suspense> in admin/login and PostsFilters — prerender succeeds.
Recommendation: On the SearchClient, read initial value from useSearchParams().get('q') and run an initial fetch when present, so deep-links to /search?q=foo show results immediately.

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all admin CRUD flows + public newsletter/search working; only minor: search query-param not auto-applied

seed_data_creation: Created during this run: category 'TEST_تجربة', idea 'TEST_فكرة_E2E', post 'TEST_مقال_E2E' (draft, redirected to /admin/posts/cmof0a4t50004owehw7yknnpx). These should be cleaned up by the main agent before production.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build-error blocking /admin/login is fully fixed. Admin login UI, dashboard, posts/categories/tags/ideas CRUD, settings update, media list, newsletter form, and search page all render and function correctly. Only minor finding: /search?q=... URL param is not pre-filled into the SearchClient input. Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_moataz_api.py was not re-run (was 100% in iteration_1). External URL: https://1c8dda95-f3d4-49df-9b80-138e3c1475c5.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca_of_the_issue: PREVIOUS BUG (now resolved): /app/frontend/src/app/search/page.tsx had top-level 'use client' AND imported SiteHeader/SiteFooter (server components calling next/headers). FIX VERIFIED: search/page.tsx is now a server component that renders <SearchClient/> for stateful logic. SiteHeader/SiteFooter now read settings via lib/settings.ts (direct Prisma) instead of self-fetching. useSearchParams calls in admin/login and PostsFilters are wrapped in Suspense. Admin sidebar uses ms-72 (RTL margin-start) instead of me-72. yarn build now succeeds and the dev overlay no longer appears.
